Thomas Boyle
  • About
  • Case Studies
  • More

How I Work

I combine careful planning, technical precision, and collaborative communication to deliver software that is reliable, maintainable, and effective.

Experience & Tools

My experience includes building a CI pipeline for a lawful surveillance product at JSI Telecom using GitHub Actions, C#, YAML, and NUKE build automation. I also contributed to the internal developer platform at JSI, working with Jenkins, VMware, and other DevOps infrastructure tools.

I have worked on mechatronics systems in the 2025 Engineering Games of Quebec, writing Python scripts for a robot that tackled multiple engineering challenges. I have also built a Discord moderation and information bot using JavaScript, and I experimented with Unity to create a school project game.

Interests

I enjoy solving logical challenges and evaluating problems from every angle to find sensible, efficient solutions. I am curious by nature, which drives me to explore new tools, improve my workflow, and adopt better practices wherever they help me work smarter.

How I Like to Work

I enjoy working with others to gain new perspectives and make the process more enjoyable. I communicate clearly in a team and focus on getting things done effectively. I also use AI tools to streamline my workflow, helping me stay efficient and continually improve the way I write code.

My approach is practical and logical: I break problems into manageable pieces, verify assumptions, and choose solutions that are maintainable and scalable. This combination of collaboration, technical discipline, and curiosity is how I deliver strong results.
